scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.//postinstall: Applies frontend/patches/* to the workspace-hoisted node_modules. patch-package lives at the workspace root because npm hoists `next` here on workspace installs; running patch-package from frontend/ would miss it. The --patch-dir flag points it at the patches directory that ships with the frontend workspace. On Vercel (where install also runs from the workspace root via vercel.json), this same hook applies the patch to the same hoisted location — one mechanism, both environments.
